detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 著名英文演說 (Outstanaing English Speech)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 李盈興	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
1.教學目標 This course aims to introduce English speeches that familiarize students with outstanding individuals’ styles and experiences, which will inspire students with independent thinking of confidence of life. The students are also asked to write reflective essays after watching/reading the speeches/scripts, brainstorming, organizing their own ideas and giving feedback to others’ ideas.  


2.教學綱要
“The King’s speech” (King George VI’s first wartime radio broadcast)
“Grace of Monaco” (Princess Grace of Monaco’s speech for the Red Cross)
Ellen DeGeneres’ 2009 commencement speech at Tulane University
Steve Jobs’ 2005 Stanford commencement address
J.K. Rowling’s 2008 Harvard commencement speech
 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Handouts.　
出版日期 : 2024年 月 
作者 : The instructor　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: (1) Final Exam 20%, (2) Assignments & Presentations 60%, (3) Participation 20%. 
Requirements: The teacher will check the attendance; those who are absent or come late will lose 1 score from the final grades for each time. Students should understand and be responsible for their grades. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
